vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on group File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/group, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0644 /etc/group
vulnerability.group: Verify Permissions on Files with Local Account Information and Credentials

triage_decision.reason: Changing /etc/group permissions to 0644 is a standard STIG remediation that does not affect SSH, console access, or critical services. The fix is straightforward and low risk.
